payload.title: WAN SSE reconnect hardening (Last-Event-ID resume)
payload.description: Stamp every /events frame with id: <tenant>:<seq> and honor Last-Event-ID by replaying missed events from the log before resuming live. Update EventStream.swift and the web client to persist + resend the last id. Closes the gap where the current 2s blind reopen drops events. Test over real WAN conditions (sleep/wake, network change, proxy idle timeout). (From SCP-125.)
